merlin:/film/102497-the-bride.synopsis:
Due to a scheduling error on our side, tickets were released a week earlier than intended. We have attempted to contact all affected bookings to advise that your booking is now a week later than originally booked. We’re sorry for the mix-up and appreciate your understanding. 

Please do contact us at action@merlincinemas.co.uk if we can help.
